headline: AUDIT SUPPLIERS THE MHRA WAY
subheading: A risk-based, step-by-step path from audit planning to verified CAPA closure.
flux_prompt: An abstract editorial composition evoking a structured, risk-based supplier GMP audit: a luminous magnifying lens of teal and cyan light hovering over an array of softly glowing stacked document layers and a faint flowchart of connected nodes mapping a supplier process flow, set against gleaming brushed stainless-steel cleanroom surfaces dissolving into deep navy shadow. Floating translucent checklist tiles and a subtle ascending five-step pathway suggest planning, on-site conduct, finding classification and corrective-action closure, with fine cyan grid lines and a precise verification tick motif rendered as light. A subtle fresh-green accent glows on a single approved node to signal qualification. Clinical-luxury mood, deep navy base with teal and cyan highlights, polished reflective textures, shallow depth of field with soft bokeh, calm precise and authoritative atmosphere. 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
